purpose: Canonical specification of the founder's mail filter rules for esphome.cloud inbound. Per ADR-005 office-hours discipline + Task 3.2 acceptance #2. tests/repo/mail_filters_check.sh compares against the founder's exported filter file (provider-specific format) when run live.

filters.rationale: Auto-label by destination address + week-of-year so the Tuesday office-hours sweep is one search-by-label.
Archive on arrival outside the Tuesday window so the inbox doesn't accrue. Auto-reply per IC-2 sets the response-time expectation; founder reads at next Tuesday.
Star hello@ inbound — these are commercial/partnership/press and warrant a closer look during office hours.
Security has 24h SLA every day; MUST stay in inbox, MUST flag as important. No archive.
Phase-0 Task 0.5 pager output. Push notification mandatory; this is the only out-of-office-hours wake.
support@ is BETA-period-not-public; mail content potentially contains commercial-tier info. Don't include in any public retro screenshot.

forbidden_filters.rationale: Per ADR-001 no realtime chat channel exists; no filter may forward inbound to one.
The provider-side auto-reply (per IC-2/3/4/5) fires on inbound. A second auto-reply during office hours would loop with senders' auto-replies.
